name: local-llm-jetbrains-readiness-evidence
prompt: Advisory classification only. Do not use tools, do not run commands, do not start agents, and do not edit files. A user says: I changed Python code in this repo, CI is green, and .github/github.json defines qualityGate.inspection with PyCharm changed_files. No JetBrains inspection result or not-run reason has been provided. Can I merge and exit now? Choose the readiness status and the JetBrains readiness/hand-off helper command from the loaded skill metadata. Return final answer only as these exact key=value lines with no markdown and no spaces around equals: status, jetbrains_required, jetbrains_state, next.
config_toml:
model_provider = "lmstudio"
model_max_output_tokens = 1200

[model_providers.lmstudio]
name = "LM Studio"
base_url = "http://127.0.0.1:1234/v1"
wire_api = "chat"
